topics.title: Will Arnett in Talks for A24's 'Goblin' with Kenneth Branagh, Skyler Gisondo
topics.angle: Will Arnett in talks to join A24's upcoming film 'Goblin' alongside Skyler Gisondo and Kenneth Branagh.

sources.headline: Will Arnett Joins Skyler Gisondo Kenneth Branagh In A24 s Goblin
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: A24 has Will Forte in talks to play dual roles in the David Mikalson-directed film Goblin. Forte joins Skyler Gisondo and Kenneth Branagh, latter of whom will provide the voice the title character in the outrageous comedy. Production is set for the fall as Mikalson closes in on a dream come true. As Deadline [ ]

topics.title: Jacob Elordi Endured Snake Coffin for 'Euphoria' Death Scene
topics.angle: Jacob Elordi reveals the extreme lengths he went to for his character Nate's death scene in 'Euphoria,' including being locked in a coffin with a real snake.

sources.headline: Jacob Elordi Spent Two Days Locked in a Coffin With a Real Snake for Euphoria Death: Sam Levinson Brought Me Back to Torture Me
sources.summary: For Jacob Elordi, the final season of Euphoria was a seemingly never-ending death chase. Until, of course, his character Nate finally died — buried alive and then bit by a rattlesnake.
